rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §25.0823 governs school prayer and religious text reading policies. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 25.0823. PERIOD OF PRAYER AND READING OF BIBLE OR OTHER RELIGIOUS TEXT.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this education code provision on school prayer.
